'''donanaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:tuberomammillary|tuberomammillary]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-n-n
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:tuberomammillary|tuberomammillary]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| donanaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:donanithi|donanithi]] || [[word:donaniji|donaniji]] || [[word:donanishi|donanishi]] || [[word:donaniki|donaniki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:donanuthuthu|donanuthuthu]] || [[word:donanujuju|donanujuju]] || [[word:donanushushu|donanushushu]] || [[word:donanukuku|donanukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:donanuthu|donanuthu]] || [[word:donanuju|donanuju]] || [[word:donanushu|donanushu]] || [[word:donanuku|donanuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:donanufthuf|donanufthuf]] || [[word:donanufjuf|donanufjuf]] || [[word:donanufshuf|donanufshuf]] || [[word:donanufkuf|donanufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:donanethe|donanethe]] || [[word:donaneje|donaneje]] || [[word:donaneshe|donaneshe]] || [[word:donaneke|donaneke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:donanothotho|donanothotho]] || [[word:donanojojo|donanojojo]] || [[word:donanoshosho|donanoshosho]] || [[word:donanokoko|donanokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:donanotho|donanotho]] || [[word:donanojo|donanojo]] || [[word:donanosho|donanosho]] || [[word:donanoko|donanoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:donanofthof|donanofthof]] || [[word:donanofjof|donanofjof]] || [[word:donanofshof|donanofshof]] || [[word:donanofkof|donanofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:donanĂŻfthĂŻf|donanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfjĂŻf|donanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfshĂŻf|donanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfkĂŻf|donanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:donanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|donanĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|donanĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|donanĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|donanĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:donanĂŻfthĂŻf|donanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfjĂŻf|donanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfshĂŻf|donanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfkĂŻf|donanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:donanĂŻfthĂŻf|donanĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfjĂŻf|donanĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfshĂŻf|donanĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:donanĂŻfkĂŻf|donanĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:donanĂŠthĂŠ|donanĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:donanĂŠjĂŠ|donanĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:donanĂŠshĂŠ|donanĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:donanĂŠkĂŠ|donanĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:donanathatha|donanathatha]] || [[word:donanajaja|donanajaja]] || [[word:donanashasha|donanashasha]] || [[word:donanakaka|donanakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:donanatha|donanatha]] || [[word:donanaja|donanaja]] || [[word:donanasha|donanasha]] || [[word:donanaka|donanaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:donanafthaf|donanafthaf]] || [[word:donanafjaf|donanafjaf]] || [[word:donanafshaf|donanafshaf]] || [[word:donanafkaf|donanafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:donanasha|donanasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:donanshĂ«sha|donanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donanrosha|donanrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donanmusha|donanmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:donanyasha|donanyasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonankshĂ«sha|godonankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonankrosha|godonankrosha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonankmusha|godonankmusha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonankyasha|godonankyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:donananasha|donananasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:donananshĂ«sha|donananshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donananrosha|donananrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donananmusha|donananmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:donananyasha|donananyasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonanankshĂ«sha|godonanankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonanankrosha|godonanankrosha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonanankmusha|godonanankmusha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonanankyasha|godonanankyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:denĂŠnasha|denĂŠnasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:denĂŠnshĂ«sha|denĂŠnshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:denĂŠnrosha|denĂŠnrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:denĂŠnmusha|denĂŠnmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:denĂŠnyasha|denĂŠnyasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godenĂŠnkshĂ«sha|godenĂŠnkshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godenĂŠnkrosha|godenĂŠnkrosha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godenĂŠnkmusha|godenĂŠnkmusha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godenĂŠnkyasha|godenĂŠnkyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:donfanasha|donfanasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:donfanshĂ«sha|donfanshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:donfanrosha|donfanrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:donfanmusha|donfanmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:donfanyasha|donfanyasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godonfankshĂ«sha|godonfankshĂ«sha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godonfankrosha|godonfankrosha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godonfankmusha|godonfankmusha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:godonfankyasha|godonfankyasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]

[[Category:Aelaki vocabulary]]
[[Category:Aelaki lemmas]]
[[Category:Word pages]]
{{wordpage|e6a8a0b}}
